tasks.title: Fix parser and lowering bugs in quench-runtime
tasks.notes: for...of/for...in, ??, ?. member access, computed property access are implemented. Still missing: module/script fallback, template literal expressions, rest parameters, spread, optional calls (?.()), real getter/setter metadata.

tasks.title: Complete Array, Map, Set, Promise, String, and Date built-ins
tasks.notes: JSON.parse fixed; Array.prototype shell with stub methods exists and is shared. Still missing: real mutating Array methods, Map/Set collections and iterators, Promise, Date.prototype, String/Number/Boolean/Object.prototype.

tasks.title: Add missing language features to the interpreter
tasks.notes: for...of/for...in, ??, ?. member access implemented. Still missing: rest parameters, spread calls, template literal expressions, getter/setter invocation, arguments object, typeof undeclared identifiers.

tasks.title: Fix value and prototype model
tasks.notes: Shared Array.prototype wired. Still missing: Object.prototype, Map/Set/Date/String/Function.prototype, new Constructor for built-ins.

tasks.title: Fix bridge host functions and Ink globals in main crate
tasks.notes: All __ink_* functions registered, including __ink_get_node_parent and __ink_set_raw_mode. __ink_get_node_children populates elements; props are serialized as JSON.

tasks.title: Integrate event loop microtasks and verify dispatch
tasks.notes: Microtasks drained via __tb_invoke_microtasks after timers; hot reload re-registers bridge functions on the fresh context.

tasks.title: runtime.js compatibility tweaks
tasks.notes: normalizeChildren rewritten to avoid unimplemented Array.prototype.flat; runtime.js loads.

tasks.title: Verify with parity tests and example apps
tasks.notes: simple.js expected to work. counter.js, use-bridge.tsx, and animations.tsx blocked on runtime gaps. Unit/parity tests still need to be added.

tasks.title: Extend build.rs linter to quench-runtime and enforce limits
tasks.notes: build.rs currently only lints src/. It must also lint crates/quench-runtime/src/ and all new runtime code must pass: file <= 500 lines, function <= 40 lines, cyclomatic complexity <= 10.
